name: Close Revelation
description: A moment of discovery or dawning realization, tight on face and hands.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A discovery hangs in the air, the full weight of it still settling.
{setting}. Something half-glimpsed snaps into terrible focus.
{setting}. The answer was always right here, waiting to be found.

1: {subject}, centered in frame, facing three-quarter toward camera.
2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left, slightly behind the first.
3: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, center frame, facing camera, closest to lens.
{subject}, right edge of frame, facing left, partially cropped.
4: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right edge of frame, facing left, furthest from lens.

background_pool: Dimly lit interior with deep amber shadows and a single overhead light source casting harsh gradients
Rain-streaked window glowing faintly behind gauze curtains, the outside world reduced to blurred halos
Cluttered desk surface receding into darkness, scattered papers and photographs visible only as edge-lit shapes
Underground concrete wall, moisture glistening, a cold industrial palette of grey and rust
action_pool: Fingers curling slowly inward to a fist
Head turning sharply to one side
One hand rising slowly to the mouth
Stillness, every muscle locked in place
